name: Almond Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy 3-quart saucepan, combine sugar, milk, corn syrup, and salt.
2. Cook and stir over medium heat until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue cooking without stirring to reach the soft-ball stage or until a candy thermometer registers 236°F.
4. Remove from heat and add butter. Do not stir.
5. Cool without stirring to 110°F.
6. Add vanilla extract and almond extract. Beat vigorously until the fudge stiffens and begins to lose its gloss.
7. Quickly stir in the chopped almonds.
8. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
9. Cool, cut into squares. Makes 3 dozen pieces.
